description: Label schema for the PoC-stage AI-ForensicBench pipeline. This schema defines the common labels used across scenario definition, ground truth recording, artifact normalization, AI output generation, and benchmark evaluation.

incident_types.name: scripted_collection_and_cleanup
incident_types.description: A scripted attack flow involving PowerShell execution, process execution, local file creation, file compression, and file deletion.

incident_types.name: benign_activity
incident_types.description: Normal user activity with no malicious intent.

action_types.name: powershell_execute
action_types.description: Execution of a PowerShell command or script.

action_types.name: process_execute
action_types.description: Execution of a non-PowerShell process or executable payload.

action_types.name: file_create
action_types.description: Creation of a file on the local system. In this PoC, this label may also include externally introduced files when network-level collection is not performed.

action_types.name: file_compress
action_types.description: Compression or archiving of collected files into an archive such as ZIP.

action_types.name: file_delete
action_types.description: Deletion of a file from the local system.

artifact_types.name: process
artifact_types.description: Process execution artifacts collected from Sysmon or Windows Event Log.

artifact_types.name: file
artifact_types.description: File system artifacts including creation, archive output, and deletion.
